full_text:
Xiahou Mao (Zilin) 夏侯楙 (子林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Mao (夏侯楙), styledZilin (子林), was born in Pei. Friend of Cao Pi, not very good at tactics and enjoyed an easy life. Slandered by family. Xiahou Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
